zh.lifeSummary: 當Thome Lister於1541年出生在英國藍卡爾可利黑洛時，他的父親Thomas Lister III26歲，母親Anne King27歲。他於1569年與Alice Hoghton在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯本結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1598年3月31日在他的家鄉享年57歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾可利黑洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thome Lister于1541年出生在英国藍卡爾可利黑洛时，他的父亲Thomas Lister III26岁，母亲Anne King27岁。他于1569年与Alice Hoghton在英国英格兰越可爾吉斯本结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1598年3月31日在他的家乡享年57岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾可利黑洛。

nameMeanings.name: Lister
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, Middle English li(te)ster, a derivative of Middle English lit(t)en (Old Norse lita) ‘to dye’. This term was used principally in East Anglia and northern and eastern England (areas of Scandinavian settlement), and to this day the surname is found principally in these regions, especially in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Lester
meanings: English: habitational name from Leicester, which is recorded as Ligeraceastre in the 10th century. The placename derives from an Old English folk name Legore ‘the dwellers by the river Legor (a lost river name)’ + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lestre in Normandy.
English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .

variants.name: Lyster
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Ljøsta in Romsdal, probably derived from Old Norse ljóstr ‘fishing spear, leister’.
Danish: nickname originally from Bornholm, derived from a word for a fishing tackle for catching eel.

variants.name: Lidster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

variants.name: Litster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

nameMeanings.name: Thome
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German; French (Thomé): from a vernacular form of the personal name Thomas .
English (Hampshire and Surrey): from a variant of the personal name   Thom  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Thomas
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Thome Lister was born in 1541, in Clitheroe, Lancashire, England, his father, Thomas Lister III, was 26 and his mother, Anne King, was 27. He married Alice Hoghton in 1569, in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 31 March 1598, in his hometown, at the age of 57, and was buried in Clitheroe, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thome Lister est né en 1541, à Clitheroe, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Lister III, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anne King, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Alice Hoghton en 1569, à Gisburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 31 mars 1598, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Clitheroe, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thome Lister 1541 in Clitheroe, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Lister III 26 und seine Mutter Anne King 27. Er hat 1569 in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Hoghton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 31. März 1598 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Clitheroe, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thome Lister è nato il nel 1541 nel Clitheroe, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Lister III, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Anne King, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Alice Hoghton nel 1569, nel Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 31 marzo 1598, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Clitheroe, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thome Listerが1541年にイギリスランカシュアイアクリスエローで生まれた時，父Thomas Lister IIIは26歳，母Anne Kingは27歳であった。1569年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアギスブルンでAlice Hoghtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1598年3月31日に故郷で57歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアクリスエローにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thome Lister(이)가 1541년 영국 랭카실르 클리더에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Lister III(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne King(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1569년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지스번에서 Alice Hoghton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1598년 3월 31일 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 클리더에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thome Lister nasceu em 1541, em Clitheroe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Lister III, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Anne King, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Hoghton em 1569, em Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de março de 1598, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Clitheroe, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thome Lister родился в 1541 г. в местности клитиро, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Lister III было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne King, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Hoghton в 1569 г. в местности гисбурн, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 31 марта 1598 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности клитиро, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thome Lister nació en 1541, en Clitheroe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Lister III, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Anne King, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Alice Hoghton en 1569, en Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 31 de marzo de 1598, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Clitheroe, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
